input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.5.1
            TITLE: vehicles will be staged per the endurance run order

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.5.1: Vehicles will be staged per the Endurance Run Order
D.12.5.1 Vehicles will be staged per the Endurance Run Order

final_answer: Vehicles will be staged per the Endurance Run Order
